message:
feat(web): Add GelOverlay for virtual gel electrophoresis simulation

Implements virtual restriction enzyme digestion and gel electrophoresis
visualization. Features 12 restriction enzymes (EcoRI, HindIII, BamHI, etc.),
3 DNA size ladders (1kb, 100bp, Lambda/HindIII), in silico digest algorithm,
and interactive GelCanvas visualization with fragment size tooltips.

Hotkey: Alt+G

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
